did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review of photoacoustic imaging (PAI) for dermatology. It mentions that machine learning algorithms 'can be harnessed' in the future to assist in diagnosis, but it does not report that the authors used AI/ML to obtain the results presented in this specific review. The study focuses on summarizing existing PAI applications and technical aspects rather than applying computational modeling or AI for data analysis.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
